$comment: Phased learning journey. Chapters unlock in order: a chapter unlocks when every element in the previous chapter has been visited. Elements reference atomic numbers and must be featured in kid-content.json. This file is additive — it does not change any existing data schema.

chapters.title: The Air Around You
chapters.tagline: Meet the invisible elements you're swimming in right now.

chapters.title: The Stuff of Life
chapters.tagline: The elements that build you — your bones, your DNA, your energy.

chapters.title: Kitchen Chemistry
chapters.tagline: Salt, toothpaste, and the secret science of breakfast.

chapters.title: The Metal Workshop
chapters.tagline: The hard-working metals that build bridges, planes, and bikes.

chapters.title: The Tech Lab
chapters.tagline: Computer chips, glowing signs, light bulbs, and batteries.

chapters.title: The Treasure Vault
chapters.tagline: Pirate gold, ancient bronze, and a metal that flows like water.

chapters.title: The Invisible Shields
chapters.tagline: Lazy gases with a strange superpower: they never, ever react.

chapters.title: The Fierce Cousins
chapters.tagline: Chlorine and fluorine's wilder relatives — liquid, purple, and vanishing.
